feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: Your tax dollars hard at work
entry.content: Your tax dollars hard at work

entry.title: Its a beautiful day out. Hugs yall
I’m believing in the bonus round
World Cup shenanigans, by orange man
We are sick and tired of this
My beer is stalking me again
Time To Clean Our OWN House
Shout out to your mom -a kid in 2016
He was a prince of a guy
And no one sits next to me on the train.
We need an answer to the passion-fruit-question
I did a capstone paper on the IRA, I sure hope they have awoken
Its like they got rid of all the OG memes
Magellan is a lot cooler than justin bieber
entry.content: Magellan is a lot cooler than justin bieber

entry.title: Intelligence agency will never guess where this is
